inputs.label: Cross-sectional Area
inputs.businessContext: Effective cross-sectional area perpendicular to the direction of fall

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective cross-sectional area perpendicular to the direction of fall
businessContext_i18n.tr: Düşüş yönüne dik etkili kesit alanı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Section efficace perpendiculaire à la direction de chute

inputs.label: Drag Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Aerodynamic drag coefficient of the object's shape

businessContext_i18n.en: Aerodynamic drag coefficient of the object's shape
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cismin şekline bağlı aerodinamik sürükleme katsayısı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de traînée aérodynamique de la forme de l'objet

inputs.label: Fluid Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the fluid through which the object falls (e.g., air at sea level ≈ 1.225 kg/m³)

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the fluid through which the object falls (e.g., air at sea level ≈ 1.225 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cismin içinden düştüğü akışkanın yoğunluğu (örneğin deniz seviyesinde hava ≈ 1,225 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des Fluids, durch das das Objekt fällt (z. B. Luft auf Meereshöhe ≈ 1,225 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité du fluide dans lequel l'objet tombe (ex. air au niveau de la mer ≈ 1,225 kg/m³)

inputs.label: Gravity
inputs.businessContext: Acceleration due to gravity (standard Earth gravity = 9.81 m/s²)

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceleration due to gravity (standard Earth gravity = 9.81 m/s²)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Accélération due à la gravité (gravité terrestre standard = 9,81 m/s²)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
